description: Thin orchestrator that acquires a task, routes to the correct SDLC skill, verifies, simplifies, runs 7-pass review, and generates PR artifacts.

steps.name: worktree_enforcement
steps.description: Enforce worktree + branch preconditions. /go stays on main; creates a named worktree with a branch for the worker, then dispatches the worker into it.

steps.name: task_selection
steps.description: Acquire a task from one of four input sources (priority: GO_PROMPT > HANDOFF_TRANSCRIPT > GO_PLAN_FILE > GO_TASKS_FILE). For queued tasks, select first eligible task with status in {ready, queued, approved}. Synthesize task contract and write active-task_{RUN_ID}.json.

steps.name: route_dispatch
steps.description: Read active-task_{RUN_ID}.json and route by task_type: implementation→/code, refactor→/refactor, design→/design_1.0, planning→/planning. Config/infra-only routes direct to verify. For implementation, check existing code changes; if empty or docs-only, skip TDD.

steps.name: verify_end_to_end
steps.description: Run every command in task.verification_commands. Record results. If all pass, touch .verified_{RUN_ID}. If any command fails and max attempts reached, touch .blocked_{RUN_ID} and emit BLOCKED token.

steps.name: simplify_code
steps.description: If docs-only diff, skip. Otherwise run /simplify. If simplify reports CRITICAL or HIGH findings, touch .blocked_{RUN_ID} and emit BLOCKED token. On success, touch .simplified_{RUN_ID}.

steps.name: seven_pass_review
steps.description: Run review passes at the depth determined by diff classification. Each pass evaluates a specific dimension (correctness, security, performance, etc.). If any pass fails, task is blocked.

steps.name: local_pr_artifacts
steps.description: Generate commit message, PR title, PR body, and PR-ready report. Write .pr-ready_{RUN_ID} and emit PR_READY token.

steps.name: loop_check
steps.description: Check if more eligible tasks remain in the queue. If yes, emit MORE_TASKS_IN_PLAN and restart from task_selection. If no eligible tasks remain, emit ALL_TASKS_COMPLETE.

terminal_states.description: Max attempts reached or simplify found CRITICAL/HIGH
Current task done, more remain in queue

gaps.description: SKILL.md workflow_steps does not include 'route_dispatch' as a separate entry. The prose describes routing in Step 2 but the workflow_steps array jumps from task_selection to verify_end_to_end.
gaps.fix: Add 'route_dispatch' as workflow_steps[2], shifting subsequent steps. Or clarify that routing is embedded within task_selection.

gaps.description: SKILL.md prose uses 'Step 3: Verification' but workflow_steps uses 'verify_end_to_end'. The accordion in index.html uses the workflow_steps name. This is a minor naming inconsistency.
